use_cases: Hero section backgrounds with animated grain overlay for visual depth and modern aesthetic
Landing page hero sections requiring atmospheric, textured backgrounds
Card or section backgrounds needing subtle noise effects to add visual interest
Brand presentations and marketing pages seeking distinctive visual treatments
Product showcases and demo pages wanting premium, textured visual styling
ai_summary: A canvas-based noise and grain overlay component that creates animated visual effects on backgrounds. Uses device pixel ratio-aware rendering with configurable pattern size, scale, and refresh intervals to generate subtle animated grain textures. Designed as a decorative background enhancement for hero sections, cards, and landing page elements.
